speaker: speaker1
text: I want something sweet after dinner .

speaker: speaker2
text: What do you have in mind ?

speaker: speaker2
text: What kind are you thinking of getting ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I want to get some pie .

speaker: speaker2
text: What kind of pie do you want ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Do you want to know what kind of pie I like ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Sure , what kind do you like ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , I love apple pie too .
